slides.title: Dark chocolate for a *sharper brain*.
slides.sub: Cocoa flavanols boost nitric-oxide blood flow to the brain — linked to sharper focus and memory.

slides.title: It's the flavanols
slides.body: The benefit comes from *cocoa flavanols*, plant compounds concentrated in real dark chocolate — not the sugar.

slides.title: More blood to the brain
slides.body: Flavanols raise *nitric oxide*, relaxing blood vessels so more oxygen-rich blood reaches your brain.

slides.title: Focus and memory
slides.body: Better cerebral blood flow is linked to *sharper focus* and short-term memory on demanding tasks.

slides.title: Go 70% or higher
slides.body: Pick *≥70% dark chocolate* — higher cocoa means more flavanols and far less added sugar.

slides.title: A square, not a bar
slides.body: A small *daily square* delivers the benefit; treat it as a habit, not a dessert binge.

slides.title: Feed your focus, *the smart way*.
slides.body: Log your food and energy in Vibe Health and your daily Health Score reveals which habits actually sharpen how you feel.

caption:
Dark chocolate isn't just a treat — cocoa flavanols boost blood flow to your brain. 🍫

They raise nitric oxide for sharper focus and memory. Go 70% or higher, one small square a day. 🔖

Log your food and energy in Vibe Health and watch which habits sharpen how you feel → link in bio.
youtube_title: Dark Chocolate for a Sharper Brain
